title: Add a "message board" to the Home page
excerpt: Would it be at all possible to add some kind of message board to the home page ? Not like a chat or anything, just general news and novelties concerning all employees. Like if I wanted to remind everyone about a policy ? …

posts.author: Ysaline (Ysaline Colonval)
posts.cookedHtml: Would it be at all possible to add some kind of message board to the home page ? Not like a chat or anything, just general news and novelties concerning all employees. Like if I wanted to remind everyone about a policy ?
